node.data: {"M8376":{"lit":"զանօրէնու<abbr>թի<\/abbr>ս","line":{"facs":"#z104236632","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l104236632","n":"16"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"8376-041b"},"n":"զանօրէնութիս"},"V1294":{"lit":"զանօրէ<lb xml:id=\"l104428027\" facs=\"#z104428027\" n=\"9\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>նու<abbr>թի<\/abbr>ս","line":{"facs":"#z104428026","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l104428026","n":"8"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"9114"},"n":"զանօրէնութիս"},"M6712":{"lit":"զանօրէնու<abbr>թի<\/abbr>ս","line":{"facs":"#z104390521","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l104390521","n":"29"},"column":{"n":"2"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"6712-132b"},"n":"զանօրէնութիս"},"M8699":{"lit":"զա<lb xml:id=\"l103947365\" facs=\"#z103947365\" n=\"18\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>նօրէնու<abbr>թի<\/abbr>ս","line":{"facs":"#z103947370","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l103947370","n":"17"},"column":{"n":"2"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"8699-132b"},"n":"զանօրէնութիս"}}
